title: Multipart Commands, Part Ledgers, and Cleanup · Boundary Failure Triage
summary: A Node incident packet contains a plausible typed multipart state machine with one unsafe assertion, stale object identity, unbounded stream, lost rejection, abort leak, cache defect, policy gap, or recovery overclaim; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in typed multipart state machine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, choose single versus multipart transfer and part size from object size, part-count limits, memory, network, retry, and completion constraints.
In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, persist upload ID, part number, offset, size, checksum, ETag, attempt, and owner so completion uses the exact accepted part list.
In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, bound part workers and bytes, cancel safely, drain results, preserve completed evidence, and prevent async task or buffer leaks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Multipart Threshold Part Size
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 4117 during a multi-tenant authorization audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate readonly multipart part evidence and AbortSignal-driven cleanup; do not treat TypeScript types, a resolved promise, CORS, ETag, or an emulator as stronger proof than it is; then abort during a stream or multipart promise and prove every task and part reaches a terminal state. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, choose single versus multipart transfer and part size from object size, part-count limits, memory, network, retry, and completion constraints.

Inspect the Multipart Threshold Part Size trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
